/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/core/MapData.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/core/Server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/core/Runtime.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/plugin/PluginManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/script/LuaRuntime.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/script/Builtins.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/network/Network.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/game-server.dir/src/network/Packet.cpp.o" -o /home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/bin/game-server  libenet_static.a -ldl -lm /usr/lib/libluajit-5.1.so
